name: Section 732(d) Basis Election

eligibility.description: Partners who purchased or inherited a partnership interest within the last 2 years where the partnership did not have a 754 election.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A partner who acquired their interest via transfer (without a Section 754 election in place) can elect to treat distributed property as having a stepped-up basis if the distribution occurs within 2 years of the acquisition.
